rationale.risk-routing: Calculates check-in threshold via regression classifier on interaction history
rationale.hitl-workflow: Provides hard constraints, approval gates, and developer checkpoints
rationale.oversight-explanation: Explains why check-ins trigger and separates policy vs model sources
rationale.survey-input: Includes formative survey of 21 developers on autonomy preferences
rationale.framework: Proposes Hedwig as a reference architecture for dynamic autonomy
rationale.built-system: Implemented as a working Python CLI coding agent prototype
rationale.agentic: Studies an AI-planned multi-step coding agent with check-ins
rationale.steering: Uses retrieval path to inject behavioral guidance into prompts
